workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Pipelines and node lists are resolved relative to this directory (passed when starting the UI).

opencode.title: OpenCode CLI
opencode.description: Corresponds to CLI opencode models <provider> parameter; written to user directory config and triggers model-lists.json refresh after typing stops.

claudeCode.title: Claude Code CLI
claudeCode.description: Built-in model list (Claude Code CLI has no models subcommand); refresh probes the claude binary in PATH. Run 'claude /login' first.

language.title: Language
language.description: Select your preferred language for the interface

onboarding.title: Onboarding Tour
onboarding.description: Restart the product tour to learn about AgentFlow's core features.
onboarding.resetSuccess: Reset complete. Tour will start automatically on next visit.
